frex.title: Frex
frex.subtitle: UI/UX Design & Deployment of Loyalty App Landing Page
frex.description: Design of user interface, user experience, and full deployment of the official landing page for Frex Club, a customer loyalty platform.
frex.longDescription: Frex represents a complete UI/UX design and deployment of the official landing page for Frex Club — an innovative platform that turns occasional buyers into frequent clients through a points and QR-scanning reward system. The landing page features a cutting-edge interface with premium scrolling and hover animations powered by GSAP, AOS, and Tilt.js. The user experience is enhanced by an interactive 3D screenshot showcase and a customized view switcher for administrator and customer app previews, designed with Bootstrap 5 and compiled via Vite.
features: Modern UI/UX Interface: High-converting landing page showcasing loyalty program options
Interactive 3D Carousel: Responsive 3D slider to showcase administrative and mobile client application screens
Premium Scroll & Reveal Effects: Smooth micro-interactions and scroll animations with GSAP and AOS
Interactive Role Switcher: Dynamic tabs to seamlessly toggle app previews for admins and clients
Fully Responsive Design: Mobile-first optimized grid structure compatible with all devices
Production Deployment: Configured asset pipeline, optimization, and server hosting setup
challenges: Building a custom 3D image carousel with pure CSS/JS for optimal page speed without heavy external plugins
Structuring an interactive dashboard preview system that switches modes instantly on client screens
solutions: Developed a custom perspective-based 3D slider in pure CSS transforms and JavaScript logic
Engineered an interactive tab switcher utilizing vanilla JavaScript to toggle app previews smoothly

medica-ms.title: Medica|MS
medica-ms.subtitle: Landing page for medical distribution
medica-ms.description: Comprehensive redesign and development of a corporate landing page for a leading medical distributor.
medica-ms.longDescription: Comprehensive redesign and development of the landing page for Comercializadora Médica MS, a leading company in Chiapas specializing in the distribution of specialized medications and integrated health services. The goal was to transform their digital presence into a platform reflecting institutional trust and modernity. The project was developed as a high-speed freelance engagement, delivering a polished and professional final product in just 4 days, meeting luxury design standards and technical robustness.
features: UI/UX Premium: 'Dark Premium' aesthetics with mesh gradients and grain textures
High-speed Performance: Asset optimization for sub-1s loading times
Mobile-First Design: Full visual hierarchy adaptation for mobile devices
Infinite Provider Carousels: Smooth display of 45+ strategic laboratory partners
Reveal Animations: Controlled entry effects for enhanced engagement
Modular Architecture: Clean maintenance via Blade and Livewire components
challenges: Visual Balance: Balancing luxury aesthetics with medical sector professionalism
Content Density: Managing 45+ partner logos without visual clutter
Aggressive Deadline: Full design, development, and optimization in 4 days
solutions: Linear Swiper.js transitions for fluid partner network visualization
Strategic Reveal effects for improved content consumption
Modular Blade/Livewire structure for scalable maintenance

hostinggc.title: HostingGC
hostinggc.subtitle: Modern Web Hosting Landing Page & Frontend Redesign
hostinggc.description: A high-performance, modern frontend redesign of a web hosting platform using Tailwind CSS 4.0, featuring cutting-edge animations with GSAP and AOS.
hostinggc.longDescription: HostingGC is a comprehensive frontend redesign and modernization of a web hosting and domain registration platform. The project focuses on an ultra-modern aesthetic using Tailwind CSS 4.0 and advanced animations powered by GSAP. The goal was to transform the user experience into a sleek, high-tech interface that reflects the reliability and speed of hosting services.
features: Modern High-Tech UI/UX with Tailwind CSS 4.0
High-performance animations using GSAP (GreenSock)
Dynamic scroll reveal effects with AOS
Responsive layout design with Bootstrap 5 compatibility
Modular architecture using Laravel Blade components
Lightning-fast asset compilation via Vite
Interactive pricing plans and service carousels
challenges: Implementing the latest Tailwind CSS 4.0 features in a production-ready environment
Creating smooth, complex animations with GSAP that remain performant across all devices
Balancing luxury high-tech aesthetics with the functional requirements of a hosting platform
Ensuring seamless responsive behavior for complex technical data tables and pricing plans
solutions: Leveraged the cutting-edge layout capabilities of Tailwind CSS 4.0 and Vite
Used GSAP for granular control over micro-animations and page transitions
Applied custom SCSS structures alongside Tailwind for advanced design tokens
Modularized the UI into reusable Blade components for better maintainability and scalability

imchissa.title: IMCHISSA
imchissa.subtitle: Full-Stack Industrial CMS & Dynamic Catalog
imchissa.description: Comprehensive industrial platform with a custom-built CMS, dynamic product catalog, and real-time content management for industrial equipment distribution.
imchissa.longDescription: IMCHISSA is a robust industrial platform designed to manage and showcase heavy equipment and machinery. The project features a custom-built Content Management System (CMS) that allows non-technical users to control every aspect of the site. From real-time landing page construction to structured technical specification management, the platform bridges the gap between complex industrial catalogs and intuitive digital management.
features: Custom Administrative Panel (/admin) for full site control
Dynamic Catalog Management with structured technical specs
Real-time Landing Page construction via CMSContentService
Integrated CKEditor for rich-text section management
Multi-gallery system per product with drag-and-drop logic
SEO-optimized with Google PageSpeed focuses (Lazy Loading)
Global site settings for contact, social, and brand identity
Advanced Security with Google reCAPTCHA and RBAC (Role-Based Access Control)
challenges: Designing a CMS that balances total flexibility with structural data integrity
Optimizing a high-density image catalog for fast load times and SEO performance
Translating industrial technical specifications into an elegant, user-friendly UI
Securing the administrative back-office against unauthorized access and spam
solutions: Implemented a service-based architecture (CmsContentService) to decouple data from presentation
Integrated advanced Lazy Loading and image optimization strategies to achieve high performance scores
Developed a structured data model for product specs that renders dynamically across different categories
Enforced strict RBAC and reCAPTCHA protection across all public and private entry points

meraki-pmc.title: Meraki PMC
meraki-pmc.subtitle: Bio Digital Premium - Interactive Digital Card
meraki-pmc.description: Modern digital card (Bio Digital Premium) for Meraki Seguros, featuring glassmorphism, advanced animations, and hybrid responsive design for enhanced professional promotion.
meraki-pmc.longDescription: The /pmc (Bio Digital Premium) digital card is a modern software piece designed for Meraki Seguros. It utilizes a robust tech stack and cutting-edge design techniques to provide a premium promotional experience. The project focuses on a 'Bio Digital Premium' concept, integrating dynamic content, trending animations, and a mobile-first UX that simulates a native app experience while maintaining a sophisticated desktop presence with glassmorphism effects.
features: UI/UX Premium with Glassmorphism (Backdrop Blur)
Responsive Hybrid Design (Mobile/Desktop optimization)
Dynamic WhatsApp Integration with structured messaging
Google Calendar Integration for direct scheduling
High-performance Infinite Logo Marquee
Native Lightbox for image viewing
Mobile-First UX with bottom navigation bar
challenges: Creating a 'native app' feel within a web-based digital card
Implementing high-performance animations (Marquee/AOS) without compromising load times
Achieving a consistent glassmorphism aesthetic across different devices
Integrating complex dynamic forms with structured WhatsApp output
solutions: Utilized hybrid design patterns to adapt layout between decorative desktop and functional mobile views
Applied hardware-accelerated CSS animations (will-change: transform) for smooth transitions
Leveraged Tailwind CSS and custom backdrop-filter properties for the premium glass effect
Developed custom JS logic to bridge the gap between form data and structured messaging APIs

voldo.title: Voldo
voldo.subtitle: Frontend UI Development & Layouts for Heavy Equipment ERP
voldo.description: Collaborated on frontend development and responsive UI design for a comprehensive heavy machinery dealer management platform.
voldo.longDescription: Voldo is a business operations platform designed for heavy equipment dealerships. On this project, I supported the frontend development and UI design, building responsive interfaces, dynamic inspection checklists, spare-parts displays, and operational dashboards. Utilizing Tailwind CSS, Flowbite components, and Livewire v3, I focused on creating an interactive, user-friendly workspace tailored to different operational roles.
features: Responsive layout design for heavy vehicle inventories, spare parts, and catalog profiles
Interactive UI building for work orders, service reports, and dynamic checklists
Frontend styling of multi-department dashboards custom-tailored to specific user roles
Streamlined UI navigation layouts for data-heavy administrative forms
challenges: Designing clean, readable user interfaces for highly complex operational workflows
Ensuring seamless mobile and tablet layout responsiveness for mechanics working in active garages
Integrating interactive reactive components without altering core backend business rules
solutions: Built clean, responsive components utilizing Tailwind CSS and Flowbite's UI design patterns
Developed reactive client-side elements in collaboration with backend devs using Livewire v3
Optimized navigation hierarchies to support fast, daily data-entry for diverse team members

marka-360.title: Marka 360
marka-360.subtitle: Full-stack corporate platform and custom CMS for digital services
marka-360.description: Custom corporate website and CMS built for a digital services agency to present services, publish portfolio and blog content, and capture leads through contact and quotation workflows.
marka-360.longDescription: Marka 360 is a full-stack corporate platform created to help a digital advertising agency showcase its services, portfolio, and content strategy while centralizing lead management in a secure back-office. The project combines a public-facing marketing site with a custom CMS where administrators manage service catalogs, nested microservices, blog posts, galleries, homepage differentiators, legal documentation, and inbound requests. Instead of building a static brochure site, the goal was to deliver a maintainable business platform that supports conversion, content updates, and internal operations from a single Laravel codebase.
features: Dynamic catalog module for services and nested microservices rendered directly on the public website
Lead capture workflows for contact messages and quote requests delivered to the admin panel in real time
Portfolio and gallery management for publishing visual case studies and grouped media assets
Blog CMS with SEO-friendly slug routing and editorial publishing support
Landing-page configuration for differentiators, solutions, and core homepage sections
Authenticated admin dashboard with internal user management and role-protected middleware
challenges: Combining a conversion-focused public website and a practical internal CMS without fragmenting the product architecture
Keeping content management intuitive for administrators while preserving a clean, scalable data model
Structuring services, microservices, galleries, blog, and lead capture into maintainable independent modules
Balancing brand presentation, responsiveness, and performance across both public and back-office interfaces
solutions: Organized the platform around modular Laravel domains so each business area could evolve without turning the codebase rigid
Used Livewire to deliver reactive admin workflows and dynamic content editing without introducing unnecessary API complexity
Protected the dashboard with authentication and role-based middleware to keep operational access controlled and secure
Used Tailwind CSS, Flowbite, and Vite to create a consistent visual system and fast asset pipeline for both experiences

ez-ticket.title: EZ Tickets
ez-ticket.subtitle: Ticketing platform for live events and venue operations
ez-ticket.description: Freelance ticketing platform focused on highlighted events, zone-based ticket purchase, QR passes, and an administrative suite for artists, venues, events, users, and legal content.
ez-ticket.longDescription: EZ Tickets is my most recent freelance work and brings together the public and operational sides of a ticketing product in a single experience. On the customer side, the platform presents featured events, detailed venue information, prohibited items, seat or area-based purchase flows, timed reservations, order summaries, and downloadable ticket passes with QR validation. On the operations side, the system includes an administration suite to manage artists, venues, events, users, branding assets, legal modules, and technical zone configuration with capacity controls.
features: Featured-event landing experience with a strong promotional hero
Event detail views with venue rules, schedules, and embedded location data
Zone-based and seat-based purchase flow with order summary and countdown
Downloadable ticket passes with QR code for validation
Administrative dashboard for artists, venues, events, users, and legal content
Technical configuration of zones, capacities, and venue structure
challenges: Balancing a sales-focused public flow with a clean back-office administration experience
Keeping ticket selection clear while availability, pricing, and countdown logic stay visible
Structuring venue and artist management so operational users can edit data quickly
Presenting tickets in a mobile-friendly format that remains readable and scannable
solutions: Separated the product into customer-facing and administrative journeys with tailored UI patterns
Used contextual purchase summaries and visual hierarchy to keep price and availability visible
Organized admin modules around operational entities like artists, venues, events, and validations
Designed a compact digital pass layout with QR emphasis for fast access and validation

lavafy.title: Lavafy
lavafy.subtitle: Frontend UI Development & Layouts for Car Wash Marketplace
lavafy.description: Collaborated on the frontend development and responsive interface styling for a mobile and web on-demand car wash marketplace.
lavafy.longDescription: Lavafy is a role-based service platform designed to coordinate residential car wash operations. On this project, I supported the frontend development and UI layout design, creating responsive interfaces for the customer panel, washer workspace, and admin dashboard. Using Tailwind CSS, Livewire v3, and Capacitor, I ensured a smooth, intuitive, and cohesive cross-platform mobile experience.
features: Custom layout design and user views for customers, washers, and administrators
Responsive styling with Tailwind CSS tailored for cross-device mobile screens
User-friendly navigation flows for services booking and appointment status checks
Polished admin interfaces displaying operational statistics and logs
challenges: Providing a fast, native-feeling mobile experience for web-based views in Capacitor
Designing highly legible layouts for service washers working in outdoor conditions
Ensuring styling consistency between Android and iOS Capacitor application packages
solutions: Designed and implemented interactive interfaces using Livewire v3 components
Optimized mobile screens using responsive layouts and accessible touch targets
Collaborated directly on UI enhancements to maximize user conversion on floating call-to-actions

jardin-del-alma.title: Jardín Del Alma
jardin-del-alma.subtitle: Interactive Website for Event Hall
jardin-del-alma.description: Interactive and optimized page to display price catalog of rental packages for Jardín Del Alma event hall. Attractive visual experience and easy to use.
jardin-del-alma.longDescription: Jardín Del Alma is a web page developed during my professional stay 1 at UP Chiapas (March-July 2023). The project focuses on creating an interactive web experience that allows users to explore the various rental packages offered by the event hall in a visual and attractive way.
features: Promotion of packages with attractive UI/UX design
Simple navigation between different sections
Modern and visually pleasing design
Fast and optimized loading
Accessibility for all users
Dynamic and responsive interaction
Interactive price catalog
challenges: Creating an attractive visual experience to display packages
Optimizing image loading for better performance
Implementing intuitive and accessible navigation
Developing reusable components in React
solutions: Use of CSS Modules for modular and responsive styles
Implementation of lazy loading of images
Architecture of reusable React components
Design centered on user experience
Web performance optimization

pase-de-lista.title: Digital Attendance System
pase-de-lista.subtitle: Multi-platform Mobile App - UP Chiapas
pase-de-lista.description: Mobile multi-platform (iOS and Android) app developed in Flutter to digitize and modernize the attendance control process in educational institutions. Actively used by teachers at the University of Chiapas.
pase-de-lista.longDescription: I developed a multi-platform mobile app using Flutter to digitize and modernize the attendance control process in educational institutions. The app allows managing institutions, groups, students, and attendance passes with fluid animations, local synchronization, and PDF/CSV report generation. Deployment on App Store and Play Store.
features: Management of educational institutions
Registration of multiple institutions
Configuration of shifts (Morning/Afternoon)
Secure deletion with confirmation
Intuitive interface with fluid animations
Administration of academic groups
Creation of groups by grade and section
Assignment of specific subjects
Linking with institutions
Organized by institution
Student management
Registration of students with name and enrollment
Single enrollment system
Mass import from CSV
Smart attendance pass system
Date selection with interactive calendar
Instant synchronization with local database
Complete attendance history
Export to CSV and PDF
File sharing via WhatsApp, email, etc.
challenges: Designing a robust and scalable MVC architecture
Optimizing the user experience on mobile devices
Integrating fluid animations and smooth transitions
Ensuring multi-platform compatibility (iOS/Android)
solutions: Use of Flutter and Dart for multi-platform UI/UX
Local SQLite database for performance and offline
Typed services and models for business logic
Deployment on App Store and Play Store

light-center-ios.title: Light Center iOS
light-center-ios.subtitle: Deployment and Optimization - iOS Application
light-center-ios.description: Deployment and publication of the Light Center app on the App Store, managing the entire publication process for iOS developed with Flutter.
light-center-ios.longDescription: Project of deployment and optimization of the Light Center app for iOS (October-November 2023). I was responsible for coordinating the entire publication process on the App Store, from resource configuration to successful launch for spa and beauty centers users.
features: Coordination of the publication and deployment process for iOS
Optimization of resources and descriptions for the App Store
Extensive testing on real iOS devices and TestFlight
Management of metadata, keywords, and graphical material
Verification of compliance requirements and Apple privacy
Successful launch for spa and beauty center users
challenges: Complete resource configuration for the App Store
Preparation of the app for Apple review
Management of metadata and keywords for positioning
Compliance with Apple privacy and security policies
Optimization of performance for iOS devices
solutions: Use of App Store Connect for complete publication management
Implementation of TestFlight for extensive beta testing
Metadata configuration for better App Store positioning
Verification of compliance with Apple policies

prediction-software.title: Prediction Software
prediction-software.subtitle: Redesign & Modernization Front-end
prediction-software.description: Complete redesign and modernization of the Prediction Soft platform, focusing on user experience, responsive design, and modern Front-end architecture.
prediction-software.longDescription: Prediction Software is a completely redesigned platform to offer a modern, fluid, and attractive user experience. I led the complete redesign, implementing dynamic components in React.js, custom styles with CSS3 and Bootstrap, and integrating an intelligent ChatBot for customer support. The project was developed under Scrum methodology, with iterative deliveries and a mobile-first approach.
features: Modern Landing Page
Responsive design optimized for all devices
Fluid and attractive user experience
Intuitive navigation with smooth animations
Integrated ChatBot for customer support
Conversational interface friendly
Automated and intelligent responses
Cross-browser compatibility
challenges: Redesigning the Front-end architecture without affecting the current operation
Optimizing performance on mobile and desktop devices
Integrating an intelligent ChatBot without affecting the experience
Ensuring cross-browser compatibility
solutions: Use of React.js for dynamic components
Bootstrap and CSS3 for responsive design and animations
Integration of ChatBot with user-friendly interface
Iterative development with organized Scrum and sprints

coepes-chiapas.title: Coepes Chiapas
coepes-chiapas.subtitle: Web Platform for Educational Offers
coepes-chiapas.description: Centralized web platform that revolutionizes access to university information in Chiapas, connecting high school students with educational opportunities in an intuitive and efficient way.
coepes-chiapas.longDescription: I developed a comprehensive web platform for the consultation of university offers in Chiapas. The system allows intelligent searches, advanced filters, automatic PDF generation, and an optimized user experience for high school students. The portal centralizes information from multiple universities and facilitates comparison and download of academic plans.
features: Advanced search engine by career and university
Customized filters by location, cost, and modality
Detailed catalog of licenciatures
Specific admission criteria
Automatic PDF generation
Download of personalized academic plans
Optimized interface for students
Responsive design for mobile and tablets
Easy comparisons between programs
Updated information from multiple universities
challenges: Centralizing updated regional educational information
Optimizing search and filtering experience
Generating personalized PDFs efficiently
Designing an intuitive interface for students
solutions: Implementation of a personalized search engine
Use of Tailwind CSS for responsive and modern design
Dynamic PDF generation with selected information
Clear and centered information architecture

dr-nabani.title: Dr. Nabani Mobile App
dr-nabani.subtitle: Comprehensive Esthetic Medicine Platform
dr-nabani.description: Multi-platform mobile app for Dr. Nabani Matus, with UI/UX design in Figma and development in Flutter/Dart. Comprehensive platform for consultation management, medical history, service catalog, payments, and medical chat.
dr-nabani.longDescription: I developed a multi-platform mobile app with Flutter/Dart for Dr. Nabani Matus, including pre-design in Figma for mobile, web, and tablet views with responsive focus. The app integrates digital medical orientation, appointment management, service catalog, medical chat, medical history, post-operative care, integrated payments, and personalized notifications. Clean Architecture, RESTful integration, and Material Design.
features: Digital medical orientation with interactive questionnaires
Appointment management and procedure tracking
Specialized service and product catalog
Integrated medical chat
Digital medical history
Post-operative care guides
Integrated payments with Stripe
Personalized notifications
Intuitive and responsive interface
Interactive animations and carousels
challenges: Designing a reliable and modern medical experience
Integrating secure payments and notifications
Optimizing medical history and appointment management
Developing a scalable and maintainable architecture
solutions: UI/UX design in Figma for all views
Use of Flutter and Material Design for responsive UI
Integration of Stripe and push notifications
Clean Architecture and state management

animenariolist.title: AnimeNarioList
animenariolist.subtitle: Your quick guide to the world of anime
animenariolist.description: Minimalist web app to search, organize, and export anime lists. Fluid interface, no ads, and export to Excel.
animenariolist.longDescription: AnimeNarioList was born from my obsession with anime and the need to keep everything organized as a good developer. It allows you to quickly search for animes, create personalized lists, and export them to Excel to share. The app is built with clean design principles, Atomic Design, and an emphasis on performance and maintainability. The code is modular, tested, and ready to scale with future features like favorites, tags, or integration with external APIs.
features: Quick anime search
Minimalist and fluid interface
Creation of personalized lists
Export of lists to Excel
Sharing anime lists
Modular and scalable design
No ads or distractions
challenges: Applying Atomic Design for maximum maintainability
Optimizing search performance
Exporting data in a user-friendly way to Excel
Keeping the UI clean and responsive
solutions: Reusable and hierarchical components
TailwindCSS for fast and consistent styles
Customized Excel export logic
Continuous testing and refactoring

my-portfolio-dario.title: My Portfolio - Dario
my-portfolio-dario.subtitle: Modern Personal Portfolio Website
my-portfolio-dario.description: A modern, responsive, and accessible personal portfolio built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and React. Features modular components, CI/CD with Netlify, and SEO optimization.
my-portfolio-dario.longDescription: My Portfolio - Dario is a personal website designed to showcase my skills, projects, and achievements as a Front-end Developer. The site is built using Next.js for server-side rendering and static site generation, TypeScript for type safety, and Tailwind CSS for rapid UI development. It features a modular and scalable architecture, reusable components, and a clean, professional design. The project is deployed with CI/CD on Netlify, ensuring fast and reliable updates. SEO best practices and accessibility standards are implemented throughout the site.
features: Modern and responsive UI
Server-side rendering and static site generation
Reusable and modular components
Continuous deployment with Netlify CI/CD
SEO optimization for better discoverability
Accessible design following best practices
Project gallery and detailed project modals
Downloadable CV
Contact section
challenges: Designing a visually appealing and consistent UI
Ensuring accessibility and responsiveness across devices
Implementing CI/CD for seamless deployment
Optimizing for SEO and performance
solutions: Used Tailwind CSS for rapid and consistent styling
Leveraged Next.js features for SSR and SSG
Configured Netlify for automated deployments
Applied semantic HTML and accessibility best practices
Implemented modular architecture for scalability

tacos-pau.title: Tacos Pau
tacos-pau.subtitle: Authentic Chiapanecan Cuisine & Distribution Platform
tacos-pau.description: A corporate and promotional landing page for a traditional Chiapanecan food business, featuring their history, products, and a distribution network system.
tacos-pau.longDescription: Tacos Pau is a digital platform designed to showcase the rich culinary tradition of Tuxtla Gutiérrez, Chiapas. Since 2005, Tacos Pau has evolved from a local favorite to a business seeking global reach. The project involved creating a high-performance landing page that highlights their mission of providing nutritional and healthy food, while also serving as a portal for potential distributors and event catering services. It features their iconic stews like Cochito and Tinga, and provides a clear business opportunity for those looking to join their distribution network.
features: Corporate History & Legacy Presentation
Traditional Chiapanecan Stews Catalog (Cochito, Tinga, etc.)
Distributor Recruitment & Business Opportunity Portal
Event Catering Service Integration
Quality Standards Showcase (HACCP & BPM)
Bilingual Ready Architecture
Responsive Design for local Tuxtla & international users
challenges: Translating traditional culinary passion into a modern digital interface
Organizing diverse content from history to business distribution opportunities
Optimizing high-quality food imagery for fast performance
Building a trust-based brand identity that reflects 20+ years of tradition
solutions: Clean and minimalist design that lets food photography take center stage
Structured content sections for easy navigation between 'Our Story' and 'Business Opportunities'
Implementation of SEO best practices for local visibility in Chiapas
Responsive layout ensuring the brand looks premium on any device

hino-chiapas.title: Hino Chiapas
hino-chiapas.subtitle: Official Dealership Web Platform (Frontend Redesign)
hino-chiapas.description: A complete frontend redesign of the official Hino truck dealership catalog and quote interface in Chiapas to improve user experience.
hino-chiapas.longDescription: Hino Chiapas underwent a complete frontend redesign to showcase the complete line of Hino trucks and buses (Series 300, 300 Híbrido, 500, and 500 Autobuses). The project focused on transforming the user interface, improving user experience (UX/UI), formatting complex technical specifications into clean responsive layouts, and optimizing the visual presentation of dynamic quote forms and call-to-actions to match Hino's brand identity guidelines.
features: Complete UI redesign of the truck catalog grouped by Series (300, 500, Híbrido, Autobuses)
Responsive specs table design for clean mobile readability
Visual enhancement of forms and call-to-actions
Frontend performance and image size optimizations
challenges: Displaying dense technical specification tables in a readable, mobile-friendly format
Ensuring strict compliance and visual alignment with Hino's brand identity guidelines
Optimizing sliders and high-resolution truck assets for fast visual loading
solutions: Developed a responsive CSS/SCSS layout utilizing responsive tables and custom font sizes
Created polished mobile-first UI components to enhance lead generation conversion
Implemented image optimization and frontend lazy loading to minimize layout weight

hino-tabasco.title: Hino Tabasco
hino-tabasco.subtitle: Official Dealership Web Platform (Frontend Redesign)
hino-tabasco.description: A localized frontend redesign and branding adaptation of the premium Hino experience for the Tabasco dealership branch.
hino-tabasco.longDescription: Hino Tabasco is a localized frontend redesign of the dealership platform customized for the Tabasco market. The project involved styling tailored marketing banners, regional contact sections, and promotional sliders to align with Toyota Financial Services campaigns, ensuring high visual performance and responsivity.
features: Redesigned regional promotion sliders and marketing campaign layouts
Clean styling of the truck catalog and specification views
Polished design for lead capturing forms and floating contact buttons
challenges: Adapting the layout to handle dynamic promotional graphics without visual clutter
Ensuring responsive and clean styling across diverse mobile screen sizes
solutions: Implemented mobile-first styling and flexible SCSS grids to handle changing promotional content
Introduced responsive layouts for float call buttons and localized contact blocks

hino-oaxaca.title: Hino Oaxaca
hino-oaxaca.subtitle: Official Dealership Web Platform (Frontend Redesign)
hino-oaxaca.description: A localized frontend redesign of the Hino catalog system for the Oaxaca dealership region.
hino-oaxaca.longDescription: Hino Oaxaca represents the frontend redesign and styling adaptation of the Hino catalog system for Santa Cruz Xoxocotlán, Oaxaca. The redesign optimized the contact and branches section layout, improved information hierarchy, and implemented responsive stylesheets to provide an optimal browsing experience for local truck buyers.
features: Redesigned contact section and branch info card layouts
Clean presentation of product catalog specifications
Responsive mobile menu navigation styling
challenges: Creating a highly readable, mobile-friendly interface for regional dealership listings and catalog items
solutions: Developed responsive CSS/SCSS and Bootstrap layouts to ensure cross-device consistency and easy navigation

jugamex.title: Jugamex
jugamex.subtitle: Online Lottery & Sports Betting Platform
jugamex.description: Full-stack online lottery and sports betting platform with secure digital wallets, real-time game management, and PayPal payment integration for the Mexican market.
jugamex.longDescription: Jugamex is a comprehensive online lottery and sports betting platform designed for the Mexican market. The system enables users to purchase lottery tickets (lotéricos), place bets on live sports matches, and manage digital wallets for deposits and withdrawals — all through a secure, responsive web interface. The platform features a full administrative back-office for managing games, matches, users, countries with custom currencies, and financial operations. Built on Laravel with a Sass/Bootstrap 5/Tailwind CSS hybrid frontend, the application integrates PayPal REST APIs for payment processing, supports role-based access control across player, manager, and administrator roles, and implements a complete KYC verification flow using official Mexican ID (INE) documents.
features: Multi-Role System: Player, Manager (Gerente), and Administrator roles with RBAC middleware
Digital Wallet Engine: Recharges, transfers between users, and withdrawal requests with admin approval queues
PayPal Integration: Full order-create/capture flow for deposits and webhook listeners for async payment events
Lottery (Lotérico) Module: Admin-configurable games with ticket purchasing, automated PDF ticket generation, and draw management
Sports Betting Module: Match creation, live odds configuration, user bet placement, and result settlement
KYC Verification: INE (Mexican ID) upload flow with admin review, token-based email verification for new accounts
Multi-Currency Support: Country-specific currency configuration managed from the admin panel
Admin Dashboard: Player statistics, movement logs, withdrawal management with status tracking, and terms/privacy editors
Password Recovery Flow: Secure email-based reset with tokenized links
challenges: Securing financial transaction integrity across concurrent wallet operations (deposits, transfers, withdrawals)
Migrating the payment gateway from Mercado Pago to PayPal without disrupting active user balances
Implementing a reliable KYC verification pipeline with INE document review and approval workflows
Building a responsive and high-performance frontend using a hybrid Bootstrap 5 + Tailwind CSS + SCSS architecture
solutions: Implemented double-entry audit logging for all wallet events with admin-visible movement tracking
Built PayPal REST API integration with order capture hooks and dedicated webhook endpoint for async event handling
Developed a token-based email verification system coupled with admin INE review queues for KYC compliance
Modularized the frontend using Laravel Blade components with Vite-compiled Sass and Tailwind utility layers for consistent styling

bedima.title: Bedima
bedima.subtitle: SaaS Spa & Wellness Management System
bedima.description: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for spas, aesthetic clinics, and wellness centers featuring appointment scheduling, inventory management, subscription billing, and PDF invoicing.
bedima.longDescription: Bedima is a SaaS management platform purpose-built for spas, aesthetic clinics, and wellness centers across Mexico. The system provides a complete operational backbone: interactive appointment calendars, customer profiles with medical restriction tracking, service and product catalogs with inventory adjustment logs, promotion and package builders, and financial reporting with PDF export. The platform implements a four-role permission hierarchy (SuperAdmin, Spa Administrator, Receptionist/Staff, and Professional) with granular permission gates across all modules. Subscription management is handled via MercadoPago integration with webhook-driven payment state synchronization. As the front-end lead, I was responsible for crafting the entire user interface using Tailwind CSS, Flowbite components, and Livewire v3 for reactive interactivity — delivering a premium, elegant experience aligned with the Bedima brand identity (gold-accented dark theme with Cormorant Garamond headings and Outfit body text).
features: 4-Role Permission System: SuperAdmin (platform-wide), Spa Admin, Receptionist/Staff, and Wellness Professional — each with granular permission gates
Interactive Appointment Scheduler: Calendar view with service-professional assignment, customer linking, and consent PDF generation
Customer Management: Full profiles with medical restriction tracking, appointment history, and loyalty metrics
Service & Product Catalog: Categories, pricing, status toggles, and supplier management with inventory adjustment logs
Promotions & Packages: Configurable discount bundles and service packages with receipt PDF generation
Subscription Billing: MercadoPago-powered plan checkout with webhook-driven status syncing and expiration handling
Financial Reporting: Revenue dashboards, exportable reports (PDF/Excel), and payment receipt generation
SuperAdmin Console: Global spa management, user administration, subscription oversight, and system log viewer
Elegant Brand UI: Custom gold-accent dark theme, Cormorant Garamond headings, Outfit body font, and smooth Tailwind animations
challenges: Designing a clean, intuitive frontend for dense data tables across multiple permission-gated views
Making real-time scheduling reactive without full page reloads across complex calendar interactions
Implementing subscription lifecycle management with reliable MercadoPago webhook state synchronization
Balancing premium aesthetic requirements (gold/dark luxury theme) with practical data-heavy interface needs
solutions: Built a component-driven architecture using Livewire v3 for reactive updates without SPA complexity
Crafted responsive layouts using Flowbite components extended with custom Tailwind utility classes and design tokens
Implemented robust background webhook handlers with idempotency guards for payment state syncing
Developed a comprehensive Tailwind config with custom color palettes (bedima gold, beauty neutrals) and animation keyframes for consistent brand expression

global-ezens.title: Global Ezens
global-ezens.subtitle: Corporate Website & Product Catalog CMS
global-ezens.description: Full-featured corporate website and CMS for a Mexican premium cleaning products company, featuring a dynamic product catalog, distributor network, blog engine, and administrative back-office.
global-ezens.longDescription: Global Ezens is the corporate digital presence for Ezens, a Mexican manufacturer and distributor of premium industrial and household cleaning products. The platform serves as both a public-facing showcase and an internal content management system. The public site features a dynamic hero carousel, an organized product catalog with 18+ premium items across categories (Industrial 5L/20L, Home, Automotive), a distributor network directory with highlighted recommended partners, a categorized blog engine with image galleries, a contact module with email notifications, and full terms & conditions management. The admin back-office — built entirely with Livewire v3 reactive components — allows administrators to manage every aspect of the site: banners, about-us content, services, products (CRUD with image uploads and slug generation), distributor listings (with ordering, descriptions, and recommended badges), blog posts with categories and images, contact information details, and gallery entries. The frontend leverages Tailwind CSS with Flowbite components and AOS scroll animations to deliver a clean, professional corporate aesthetic with the Ezens brand palette (deep blue, vibrant green, and sky-blue accents).
features: Dynamic Hero Carousel: Admin-managed banner slides with title, subtitle, CTA buttons, and image uploads (up to 7 active slides)
Product Catalog CMS: Full CRUD for 18+ premium cleaning products with categories, pricing, slug-based URLs, stock tracking, and image management
Distributor Network: Admin-managed partner directory with descriptions, bullet highlights, recommended badges, and custom ordering
Blog Engine: Categorized blog system with rich-text content, image galleries, publication dates, and individual post views
Contact Module: Multi-type contact details management (phone, email, social, address) with automated email notifications via Laravel Mail
Services Section: Dynamic services management with descriptions and image galleries via Livewire reactive forms
Gallery Management: Admin-managed photo gallery with upload, editing, and organized display
About Us CMS: Editable company information sections with rich content and image support
Role-Based Admin Panel: Secured admin dashboard with role middleware (admin-only access) and user management
AOS Scroll Animations: Smooth reveal effects throughout the public site for enhanced user engagement
challenges: Building a fully dynamic CMS where every section of the public site is admin-editable without code changes
Managing a diverse product catalog with mixed image sources (local assets, public storage) across different upload eras
Creating a cohesive brand experience across the entire site with consistent blue/green corporate palette
Implementing a responsive admin interface with real-time Livewire components for non-technical staff
solutions: Architected a section-based routing system where a single dashboard view dynamically renders different partials based on section IDs
Built a smart image resolver (Producto::resolveImageUrl) that gracefully handles legacy local assets, storage paths, and CDN URLs
Developed a comprehensive Tailwind config with custom brand colors (ezens-azul, ezens-verde, teal scale) for consistent design tokens
Leveraged 22+ Livewire admin components for reactive CRUD operations with inline validation and real-time feedback

tuxventas.title: TuxVentas
tuxventas.subtitle: Mobile-First Local Classifieds & Marketplace
tuxventas.description: Sophisticated classifieds marketplace platform optimized for mobile compilation via Capacitor, with real-time chats, user reputation, QR codes, and a robust admin moderation system.
tuxventas.longDescription: TuxVentas is a modern classifieds marketplace platform designed to facilitate local buying and selling (specifically tailored for the Chiapas region). The platform is engineered with a mobile-first philosophy, wrapped in Capacitor to compile native Android and iOS applications from web assets. The backend operates as a hybrid architecture: it serves a web-based public marketplace (listings, dynamic categories, question-answer blocks) while exposing a secure RESTful API documented using Swagger/L5-Swagger for mobile devices, protected by Laravel Sanctum. The platform features an interactive conversation engine where buyers and sellers can chat in real-time, negotiate prices, close transactions, and leave ratings that feed into a user reputation score. Listing images support multi-upload with drag-and-drop cover designations. For fraud and safety, the platform integrates a comprehensive administrative moderation panel that compiles system stats, tracks flagged listings in an abuse alert queue, and grants moderators the power to approve/block listings, suspend fraudulent users, or audit private chats involved in transaction disputes.
features: Capacitor Wrapper: Mobile-ready codebase compilable to native Android and iOS packages
Sanctum API Gateway: Secure REST API endpoints for mobile devices with token-based authentication
L5-Swagger Docs: Fully documented API sandbox allowing interactive endpoint testing from the browser
Real-Time Chat: Dynamic messaging engine between buyers and sellers, supporting offer negotiations and status closures
Reputation & Reviews: Post-transaction rating system that updates seller reputation metrics
Image Management: Multi-upload support for listing images with dynamic cover selector and storage cleanup
Listing QR Codes: Automated QR generation for quick scanning and listing sharing on physical media
Moderation Dashboard: Real-time overview of active listings, pending reviews, and user reports
Flagged Alerts Queue: Admin ticketing system to assign, review, and resolve reported listings and user abuse
Chat Audit Tool: Administrative override to audit private dispute conversations for moderation integrity
challenges: Ensuring API parity between the web-based Blade/Livewire screens and the mobile Capacitor application client
Designing a real-time negotiation chat that remains lightweight and responsive on low-bandwidth mobile networks
Building a trust-based ecosystem to prevent fraud and spam listings without introducing high registration friction
Structuring a clean image optimization pipeline for user-uploaded phone photos (high MB sizes)
solutions: Developed a robust Sanctum API layer representing all user and transaction actions with unified validation structures
Leveraged Livewire v3 reactive lifecycle events for instant chat updates on the web client, matching mobile REST polling
Designed a dual moderation flow combining automated flag thresholds (alerts queue) with manual administrative auditing tools
Implemented server-side image resizing and format conversion routines to optimize storage and speed up thumbnail loading
